zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Wynninge於1482年出生在英國波克夏時，她的父親Robert Wynninge31歲，母親Elizabeth Wennington34歲。她於1506年與Sir Thomas Cordray Morris在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於從1556年1月11日到1557年1月10日在英國英格蘭維爾爾特，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Wynninge于1482年出生在英国波克夏时，她的父亲Robert Wynninge31岁，母亲Elizabeth Wennington34岁。她于1506年与Sir Thomas Cordray Morris在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于从1556年1月11日到1557年1月10日在英国英格兰維爾爾特，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Wynninge was born in 1482, in Berkshire, England, her father, Robert Wynninge, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Wennington, was 34. She married Sir Thomas Cordray Morris in 1506, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. She died from 11 January 1556 to 10 January 1557, in Chute, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Wynninge est née en 1482, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Wynninge, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wennington, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Cordray Morris en 1506, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée du 11 janvier 1556 au 10 janvier 1557, à Chute, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Wynninge(이)가 1482년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Wynninge(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wennington(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Sir Thomas Cordray Morris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 1월 11일부터 1557년 1월 10일까지 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 c후트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wynninge nasceu em 1482, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Wynninge, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wennington, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Cordray Morris em 1506, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu de 11 de janeiro de 1556 a 10 de janeiro de 1557, em Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Wynninge родилась в 1482 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Wynninge было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wennington, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Cordray Morris в 1506 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла с 11 января 1556 по 10 января 1557 в местности чут, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
